turns.source_text: yup today hit me extra hard since im unemployed. i feel like im not meant to work, or meant to do anything really!
turns.user_message: I feel like I have nothing good to offer anymore. Nothing I do seems to matter.
I used to actually care about my job but now I can't remember why. Everything I do feels pointless.
I stare at my screen for hours and can't make myself start anything. I don't see the point of any of it.
